summaryForNext: 1 adopt (stock docker-compose on ubuntu-latest) + 4 build_required (G2 per-PR stub smoke job, G3 opt-in nightly/dispatch real smoke needing cross-org PAT, G4 make/README target, G5 optional realtime-receipt via dev-IdP+Keto-seed).
